whatIs.a: Salafi Durus is a platform for authentic Islamic audio lectures from trusted scholars following the Salafi methodology.

saveLectures.q: How do I save lectures for later?
saveLectures.a: Tap the bookmark icon on any lecture to add it to your Library. You can access saved lectures from the Library tab.

offline.a: Yes — download lectures using the download button on the lecture detail screen. Downloaded lectures are available without an internet connection.

followScholar.q: How do I follow a scholar?
followScholar.a: Visit a scholar's profile and tap Follow. New lectures from followed scholars appear in your Feed.

responseTime.a: We aim to respond within 48 hours.

notFound.title: Oops!
